projects.title: Aura Restaurant Branding
projects.subtitle: Sleek sensory branding system for a contemporary fine dining experience.
projects.objective: Develop an elegant visual identity including custom logo typography, color palette, custom menus, and upscale packaging reflecting their culinary philosophy.
projects.outcome: A cohesive, high-end visual presence that elevated customer dining perception and established their visual tone as premium, modern, and minimal.

projects.title: Solstice Skincare
projects.subtitle: Minimalist aesthetic campaigns for a luxury organic skincare range.
projects.objective: Craft clean, thumb-stopping Instagram feeds, promotional stories, and paid advertisements that communicate natural purity and visual calm.
projects.outcome: Increased social media engagement by 40% and established a premium visual feed consistency that elevated retail conversions.

projects.title: Nordic Film Festival Posters
projects.subtitle: Editorial typographic posters for a seasonal European film festival.
projects.objective: Design a striking poster series combining bold Swiss typography and minimalist artwork capturing high-concept cinematic themes.
projects.outcome: A widely praised series distributed across physical urban sites, driving a record 30% attendance spike through visual curiosity.

projects.title: Verdant Botanical Ads
projects.subtitle: Luxurious organic product promotions for a modern magazine editorial.
projects.objective: Formulate print magazine advertisements highlighting organic ingredients utilizing delicate layouts and harmonious spacing.
projects.outcome: Constructed premium editorial ads that reinforced brand authority in premium beauty publications and secured boutique distribution.

projects.title: Zenith Architect Studio
projects.subtitle: Ultra-modern portfolio platform concept for a boutique structural firm.
projects.objective: Draft an immersive, dark-themed website interface mapping architectural photography, clean thin borders, and bold headers.
projects.outcome: Delivered a dramatic digital experience focusing strictly on physical space, elevating client inquiries and studio prestige.

enquiries.name: Sarah Croft
enquiries.details: Hi Harmandeep, we would love to hire you for a custom packaging and brand identity design project for our luxury candle brand!
